name: Happy Magic Show
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: After the wielder releases an Exalt, they gain [StateArg1] Aliemus and [StateArg2] Keyflare, repeating once for every 4 cards in hand. If the current Realm is {Ultra}, after the wielder's Cards enter {Ultra Space}, they gain Temporary {STR} equal to [StateArg3]% of the wielder's Attack, triggering up to 2 times per turn.
